response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming as a hard minimum, and this candidate has only about six months of professional C++ work (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus an undergraduate thesis. The career trajectory is centered on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work rather than large-scale cloud compute platforms in C++. While there is some distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic and broad engineering breadth, the core technical requirement and the cloud-platform leadership focus are not met.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Some distributed/low-latency experience at Sociomantic handling high request volumes
Demonstrated mentoring and community work (workshops, courses, talks)
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months, far below the 8-year minimum
No evidence of building or leading an internal cloud compute platform
No formal technical-leadership track record managing cross-team priorities and deliverables

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra ownership
Limited formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
